parameters.jsCode:
const count = $input.all().length;
return [{ json: { success: true, prospects_added: count, message: `Scraped and saved ${count} prospects to Supabase` } }];

meta.description: Scrapes Google Maps for local businesses in target city and saves to Supabase as prospects. Trigger via webhook with city/state/categories.
meta.usage: POST to webhook with body: { city: 'Fayetteville', state: 'NC', categories: 'tattoo shop,barbershop,gym,restaurant,bar' }
requirements: Google Maps API key (set as env var GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in n8n)
